title: System Design
description: Comprehensive roadmap covering foundations, distributed systems, scaling, and optimization techniques for designing robust systems.

lessons.title: What, Why, How, When, and Where of System Design
Functional vs Non-Functional Requirements (FR vs NFR)
Common Constraints: Too Many Users, Too Much Data, Low Latency Needs
HTTP Status Codes and Best Practices
Scaling APIs: Converting Sync to Async
Encryption at Rest and in Transit
API Gateway vs Load Balancer vs Reverse Proxy
Polling vs Long Polling vs WebSockets vs Webhooks vs SSE
Timeouts, Retries, Circuit Breakers, and Fallback Strategies
Why Caching Matters in System Design
Cache Performance Metrics (Hit Rate, Miss Penalty, Latency)
Caching in Databases (MySQL Query Cache, Postgres, MongoDB)
How CDNs Work (Edge Nodes, POPs, Origin Servers)
CDN Benefits: Latency, Scalability, and Availability
Cache Hierarchies in CDN (Edge, Regional, Origin)
CDN Security: DDoS Protection, TLS, WAF
Akamai, Cloudflare, Fastly, and AWS CloudFront Overview
Case Study: YouTube and Netflix CDN Design
Edge Compute and Serverless at the Edge

modules.title: Databases and Storage Design
modules.description: Deep dive into how databases are built and scaled — from internal storage structures like B-Trees and LSM Trees to sharding, replication, transactions, and distributed consistency models essential for Staff Engineers.

sections.title: Core Data Structures and Storage Mechanisms

lessons.title: SQL vs NoSQL: Data Models and Tradeoffs
Types of Indexes (Clustered, Non-Clustered, Composite, Covering)
Index Types: B-Tree, Hash, GiST, GIN, Inverted Indexes
Locking Mechanisms: Row, Table, Intent Locks
How Search Differs from Database Queries
Global vs Local Indexes in Sharded Systems
Database Proxying and Query Routing (PgBouncer, ProxySQL, Vitess)
Eventual Consistency and Tunable Consistency Levels
Write Amplification and Read Latency Trade-offs
Monitoring, Query Profiling, and Explain Plans

sections.title: Distributed Database Design and Real-World Systems

lessons.title: Google Spanner: TrueTime and Global Consistency
CockroachDB and YugabyteDB: Resilient SQL at Scale
Cassandra and ScyllaDB: Eventually Consistent Systems
TiDB, Vitess, and PlanetScale: Scaling MySQL Architectures
Core Messaging Concepts: Topics, Queues, Producers, Consumers
Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS: Choosing the Right Tool
Schema Registry and Serialization (Avro, Protobuf, JSON)
Message Delivery Semantics: At-Most-Once, At-Least-Once, Exactly-Once
Retries, Dead Letter Queues, and Poison Messages

sections.title: Scalability and Performance in Messaging Systems

lessons.title: High Throughput and Low Latency Tuning
Stream Processing Tools (Kafka Streams, Flink, Spark Streaming)
Throughput vs Latency in Data Pipelines
Single Master and Large Chunk Size
Fault Tolerance, High Availability, and Data Integrity
Introduction to Consensus in Distributed Systems
Consensus in Practice: etcd, Consul, ZooKeeper
Three Pillars: Logs, Metrics, and Traces
